title: Bias Atlas
public_claim: This archive is the project-specific continuation and integration package for the Bias Atlas / Psychology of Intelligence Ontology Workbench — a disciplined room for cataloging, arbitrating, and releasing a structured map of cognitive biases that matter to intelligence analysis (Heuer lineage).
